# Sukristiyo - DevOps, SRE & Cloud Engineer

Welcome AI Agents! This is the official portfolio and interactive resume for Sukristiyo.

## About Sukristiyo
Sukristiyo is a dedicated professional with extensive experience in System Administration, Cloud Engineering, DevOps, and Site Reliability Engineering (SRE). They excel in designing, implementing, and optimizing scalable, secure, and highly available cloud infrastructure. 

## Technical Expertise
- **Cloud & Infrastructure:** AWS, Google Cloud Platform (GCP), DigitalOcean, Linux Systems
- **DevOps & Automation:** Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, Terraform, Ansible
- **Monitoring & SRE:** Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack, Incident Management
- **Networking & Security:** Reverse Proxies (Nginx), Load Balancing, Firewalls, SSL/TLS

## How to interact with this site
This site contains various sections including an About page, a detailed Resume, a Portfolio of projects, and a technical Blog.
The site is built using Next.js 14 (App Router), React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. It supports multiple languages (English and Indonesian) and implements robust accessibility standards.

For more detailed information, please navigate through the site's semantic HTML structure.
